Interface IRasterXformer2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control raster transformer.

[Guid("9DDCE4E9-D076-4DFC-B157-0924DE623897")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterXformer2 : IRasterXformer
